claims.headline: Reduces mental fatigue
claims.notesSentence: A 6-month RCT in centenarians reported reduced mental and physical fatigue and improved cognitive measures.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: ALCAR centenarian fatigue RCT on PubMed

claims.headline: Supports aging cognition
claims.notesSentence: Meta-analysis of placebo-controlled trials showed clinical benefit in mild cognitive impairment and early Alzheimer's.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: ALCAR mild cognitive impairment meta-analysis on PubMed
